name: obsidian-data
description: ObsidianData（黑曜数据）— CSV/Excel 规则引擎洞察平台

scripts.setup: bun run setup:backend && bun run setup:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "bun run dev:frontend" "bun run dev:backend"
scripts.start: bun run build && cross-env ENV=production node scripts/run-backend.mjs
